danger_signals.visual_form: Gang members with aggressive postures, leather jackets, weapons

danger_signals.meaning: Danger from environment rather than enemies

danger_signals.visual_form: Corporate executives in formal wear paired with criminal associates

safety_signals.visual_form: Friendly named characters in close proximity
safety_signals.meaning: Safe zone for dialogue and planning

safety_signals.visual_form: Towns, diners, safe houses with neutral NPCs

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Motorcycle customization shops, biker bars, road locations

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Security guards in corporate uniforms, enforcers
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Modern offices, manufacturing plants, corporate headquarters

faction_indicators.color_identity: Dark/opposing color scheme to protagonist gang

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Red Tribe symbols visible, friendly NPCs present, relaxed environment
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: NPCs acknowledge protagonist peacefully, no combat triggers

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Corporate logos increase, formal authority figures present, security visible
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Increased hostility from corporate agents, restricted access to areas

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Rival gang symbols appear, environment shows conflict damage, territorial markers
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Increased combat encounters, NPCs express tension/fear, rival gang presence grows

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Mixed faction presence, unclear authority, environmental clues (documents, evidence)
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: NPCs become evasive, hidden agendas revealed through dialogue and discovery

environmental_storytelling.example: Rough biker bars and shops in protagonist territory vs. sleek corporate offices in Corley Motors areas
NPCs wear faction colors/styles; corrupted individuals show mixed corporate/criminal dress
Environments show wear/damage as conflicts escalate; pristine corporate spaces suggest untouched power
Motorcycles, corporate documents, and weapons appear in locations to reinforce political stakes
Allies cluster in safe locations; enemies are spread through hostile territory

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Relaxed posture, initiates dialogue, receives respect from gang members
Cautious movement, hostile NPCs approach, combat likely
Authoritative posture, guards present, refuse dialogue with outsiders
Relaxed stance, greeting acknowledgment, provide information/assistance
Aggressive posture, weapons readied, attack on sight
Retreat from conflicts, avoid protagonist if danger is present, provide warnings

notes: Full Throttle is a narrative-driven adventure game where visual communication focuses on faction identity through character design and environmental aesthetics. The game's political situation (corporate conspiracy vs. biker gang) is conveyed through clothing, location design, and NPC behavior rather than explicit UI elements. World-state is communicated through the presence/absence of faction symbols and the behavioral responses of NPCs to the protagonist's presence.
